things.name: Markthal
things.description: Spectacular arch-shaped market hall with a giant food mosaic ceiling and 100 food stalls

things.name: Cube Houses (Kubuswoningen)
things.description: Piet Blom's iconic tilted yellow cube houses — visit the Kijk-Kubus show house inside

things.name: Erasmus Bridge
things.description: The Swan — Rotterdam's elegant 802-metre cable-stayed bridge and symbol of the modern city

things.name: Museum Boijmans Van Beuningen
things.description: World-class art collection from Bruegel to Dali, currently shown at the Depot building

things.name: Depot Boijmans Van Beuningen
things.description: Mirrored spherical building — the world's first publicly accessible art depot housing 151,000 works

things.name: Euromast Observation Tower
things.description: 185-metre tower with a rotating restaurant and optional abseil/zip-line experience

things.name: Hotel New York
things.description: Grand Café in the former Holland America Line HQ — the departure point for millions of emigrants

things.name: Rotterdam Harbour Boat Tour
things.description: Spido boat tour through Europe's largest port — past supertankers, container ships and the Maasvlakte

things.name: Witte de With Cultural Quarter
things.description: Rotterdam's arts and nightlife district with galleries, museums, bars and street art

things.name: Kinderdijk Windmills
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage site with 19 historic windmills on the polders, 15 km east of Rotterdam
